title: Testing Requirement
description: Schema for a testing requirement — a required test that verifies compliance with Division 07 specification requirements.

testing_id.description: Unique identifier for this testing requirement.

title.description: Concise description of the testing requirement.

acceptance_criteria.description: Criteria for passing the test (e.g., 'minimum 200 psi pull-off adhesion').

timing.description: When the test must be performed (e.g., 'prior to installation', 'during installation').

frequency.description: How often the test must be performed (e.g., 'one per 10,000 sf', 'each day of application').
